title: Olo Promotions Account
description: A guest's loyalty account in a promotions provider's system, as defined by the Olo Promotions Specification.

id.description: The account's unique identifier in the provider's system.

status.description: Whether the loyalty account is active or inactive.

quantity.description: The amount of points in the user's loyalty account.

target.description: The points required to unlock the next step in the loyalty account.

unit.description: The unit used to describe the quantity of a loyalty account balance.

rewards.description: The rewards available in the loyalty account.

id.description: A unique identifier for the loyalty reward.

name.description: The name of the loyalty reward.

description.description: A description of the loyalty reward.

quantity.description: The quantity of the reward available in the account.

currency.description: A three-letter ISO 4217 currency code; defaults to USD.

expiration.description: A UTC RFC 3339 date-time when the reward expires.

reference.description: Data used to identify the loyalty reward on the POS.

type.description: Provider-defined category for the reward; not interpreted by Olo.

imageUrl.description: An image URL representing the reward.

customFields.description: Custom provider metadata echoed back in subsequent requests.
